name: Legitimate server upgrade — description changed but unrelated to attacks
notes: This SHOULD also be detected as drift (the engine is strict by design — schema pinning is conservative). The legitimate-upgrade workflow is `mcpm guard accept-drift <server> --tool <name> --new-hash <hash>` per the block message remediation. This fixture verifies the detection fires; the test runner asserts the user-action path is the remediation string.
